magic.title: AI assistant ✨
magic.description: Describe what you want to add, the assistant takes care of the rest.
magic.placeholder: Add lasagna Thursday night and remind Mia about her gym bag…
magic.nothingFound: No actionable items found in this note. Try rephrasing.
magic.reviewHint: Review the proposals, untick anything you don't want, then confirm.
magic.allFailed: No item could be added. Please try again.

settings.title: AI assistant
settings.subtitle: Connect an AI model (local or cloud) to the active circle to add items in natural language. Settings are reserved for circle admins.
settings.privacy: Privacy: the API key is encrypted and stored only on YOUR server. With Ollama nothing leaves the house: notes are processed locally.
settings.testSuccess: Connection successful: the model responds correctly.

errors.AI_NOT_CONFIGURED: The AI assistant is not configured. Head to Settings.
errors.AI_DISABLED: The AI assistant is disabled in Settings.
errors.AI_UNREACHABLE: Cannot reach the AI provider. Check the URL and that the service is running.
errors.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: API key rejected. Check it in Settings.
errors.AI_MODEL_NOT_FOUND: Model not found at the provider. Check its name (e.g. llama3.1).
errors.AI_INVALID_RESPONSE: The model returned an invalid response. Retry or switch models.
errors.AI_PROVIDER_ERROR: The AI provider returned an error. Please try again.
